full_text:
Qin Xiu (Xuanlang)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Xiu, styledXuanlang, was born in Yunzhong in Xinxing. Opposed Jia Chong taking command of armies against Wu, highly critical of major Jin figures. Qin Xiu was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
